evidence_summary: Establish a magical solution to the group's travel predicament through a small-scale supernatural encounter. The sequence must emphasize the scale disparity between the human travelers and the mouse royalty while transitioning the mood from hopelessness to...

Dorothy uses her whistle to summon the Queen of the Mice. The Queen appears and informs them they are heading the wrong way, then reveals that the Golden Cap can be used to command the Winged Monkeys for transport.
The group is stationary and despondent amidst the scarlet flowers.
The group looks toward the sky with newfound hope/curiosity.
Summoning the Queen of the Mice to receive instructions regarding the Golden Cap.
